remaining_reasons: Qwen3.5-MoE text tower alternates linear_attention and full_attention layers; local wrapper tests now cover full_attention KV tuples plus linear_attention conv/recurrent state round-trip.
BloomBee backend tests now cover Qwen3.5 linear_attention raw conv/recurrent descriptors, cache materialization, select, and update without using attention KV slab writes.
No one-block server proof has been run for a Qwen3.5 alternating linear_attention/full_attention layer span, so route/showcase/demo promotion remains blocked.
Outer qwen3_5_moe multimodal/conditional-generation config remains unserved; this slice registers text_tower model_type=qwen3_5_moe_text only.
next_step: Run a Qwen3.5 one-block server proof on suitable memory, then only promote further gates if one-block, multi-block, full/cache generation, and load proofs pass for the exact model row.
